system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.dqt_quytrinh_sanpham_getbymasp","body":"

CREATE PROC [dbo].[DQT_QUYTRINH_SANPHAM_GETBYMASP] (@MaSP NVARCHAR (200))
AS
SELECT B.ID,
       c.customer AS khachhang,
       A.masp,
       C.tensp,
       C.hehang,
       C.loaisp,
       dbo.GetNameBySTT (a.masp, LEFT (a.stt, 1)) AS cumchitiet,
       a.stt,
       A.mact,
       A.chitiet,
       A.dayy_tc,
       A.rong_tc,
       A.dai_tc,
       A.soluong_tc,
       A.dayy_sc,
       A.rong_sc,
       A.dai_sc,
       A.soluong_sc,
       A.mong1,
       A.mong2,
       A.phoi_ghep,
       a.nguyenlieu,
       a.dayy_phoi,
       a.bemat,
       a.somat_giacong,
       a.chitiet_ghep,
       B.MatChinh,
       B.MatPhu,
       B.QuyTrinh1,
       B.QuyTrinh2,
       B.QuyTrinh3,
       B.QuyTrinh4,
       B.QuyTrinh5,
       B.QuyTrinh6,
       B.QuyTrinh7,
       B.QuyTrinh8,
       B.QuyTrinh9,
       B.QuyTrinh10,
       B.PH_QuyTrinh1,
       B.PH_QuyTrinh2,
       B.PH_QuyTrinh3,
       B.PH_QuyTrinh4,
       B.PH_QuyTrinh5,
       B.DauCay1,
       B.DauCay2,
       B.Canh1,
       B.Canh2,
       B.Mat1,
       B.Mat2,
       B.ViTri_Khac,
	   B.DonGia_ChiTiet,
	   b.ThanhTien,
	   b.DonGia_NguyenLieu,
	   a.cc_mat1, a.cc_mat2, a.cc_canh1, a.cc_canh2, a.cc_dau1, a.cc_dau2,
       CASE
          WHEN LEN (ISNULL (b.ghichu, '')) = 0 THEN A.ghichu
          ELSE B.ghichu
       END AS ghichu,
	   trongluong = (A.dayy_tc * A.rong_tc * A.dai_tc * A.soluong_tc * COALESCE(NL.trongluongrieng, 0))/1000000000,
	   A.id_nguyenlieu
FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan A
     LEFT JOIN dqt_quytrinh_sanpham B ON A.masp = B.MaSP AND A.mact = B.MaCT
     LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham C ON A.masp = C.masp
	 LEFT JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva NL ON A.id_nguyenlieu = NL.id
WHERE     A.masp = @MaSP
      AND A.hoanthanh = 1
      AND ISNULL (A.mact, '') <> '000'
      AND ISNULL (A.nguyenlieu, '') NOT IN ('', '0')
ORDER BY a.t_sort, A.stt


","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.dqt_quytrinh_sanpham","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
